opinion.h1: NELLIS v. MARYLAND CASUALTY CO, 296 U.S. 615 (1935)
opinion.h2: William L. NELLIS, petitioner, v. MARYLAND CASUALTY COMPANY.* No. 342.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. T. T. Ansberry, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 168.[ Nellis v. Maryland Casualty Co 296 U.S. 615 (1935) ]
